Given I copy an NMD document → then navigate to you-have-added-a-product page or departure-product-summary-storage Arrival Tab page → edit and update net weight of the product on arrival and net weight of the fishery products on arrival → then navigate to departure-product-summary page:

**Expected:** Storage arrival weights reflect and update so should storage departure weights

**Actual:** Storage departure weights from the original document are retained

Evidence: GBR-2026-SD-996FA8C2A

## Acceptance Criteria

- When a user copies an NMD document and navigates to the "you-have-added-a-product" then clicks on edit which leads to `create-non-manipulation-document/GBR-2026-SD-9BEF7315B/add-product-to-this-consignment/0` there you can edit 'Net weight of the product on arrival', when you adit that and click save and continue, go to this page `create-non-manipulation-document/GBR-2026-SD-9BEF7315B/departure-product-summary#storageArrivalTab` the storage arrival tabe updates the wieghts accordengly, hoever #storageDepartureTab, `create-non-manipulation-document/GBR-2026-SD-9BEF7315B/departure-product-summary#storageDepartureTab` does not. We need to ensure that they update the value accordinlgy

- Edited arrival fishery product weight although displayed correctly on Check and confirm and Check your answers pages, still retains original value on pdf. We need to ensure that the pdf also reflects the updated weight value, mmo-fes-pdf is the service reposible for this
